text:
Once upon a time, in a small village nestled among rolling hills and lush green forests, there was a wise old tree named Qwen. Unlike other trees, Qwen could speak and understand the thoughts of those who came to seek its wisdom.

One sunny morning, a young girl named Lily wandered into the village, her heart heavy with sadness. She had just learned that she would have to move to a new city with her family, leaving behind all her friends and familiar places. As she approached the ancient tree, she felt a comforting presence.

"Hello, Qwen," Lily whispered, tears welling up in her eyes.

The tree responded with a soft rustling of leaves. "Dear child, why do you look so sad?"

Lily explained about her upcoming move and how much she would miss her home. Qwen listened intently, its branches swaying gently.

"Remember, dear, that even though you may change your physical surroundings, the essence of home is within you," said
